name: ESP32-S3-DevKitC-1
description: Dual-core ESP32-S3, WiFi+BT, 8MB Flash, 4MB PSRAM, USB-C, 44 GPIO
notes: N8R8 variant recommended (8MB flash + 8MB PSRAM). Search 'ESP32-S3-DevKitC-1 N8R8'

name: ESP32-S3-WROOM-1U
description: ESP32-S3-WROOM-1U-N8R8 module only (solder for custom PCB)
notes: For custom PCB builds

name: INMP441
description: I2S digital MEMS microphone, omnidirectional, low noise
notes: 3.3V logic, I2S interface. Get 3-5 pack for redundancy

name: WS2812B 24-LED Ring
notes: WS2812B 5050 RGB LEDs. Search 'WS2812B 5050 24 LED ring'

name: WS2812B 12-LED Ring
description: 12x WS2812B RGB LED ring, 5V, diameter 35mm (compact option)
notes: Smaller footprint for tight enclosures

name: BME280
notes: Optional. Great for room climate awareness

name: Electret Mic + Amplifier
notes: Alternative to INMP441. Analog output, easier to use but lower quality

name: 3W Class D Amplifier
description: PAM8403 stereo 3W per channel amplifier module
notes: For speaker output. Optional if using digital output only

name: 4 Ohm 3W Speaker
notes: 3W 4Ω speaker. Small enclosures OK at 2W

name: 100µF 16V Capacitor
description: Electrolytic capacitor for LED power stabilization
notes: Place across LED ring power lines to prevent brownout

name: 100nF Ceramic Capacitor
notes: Place near ESP32 power pins

name: 2.54mm Jumper Wires
description: Dupont wire kit, male-male, male-female, female-female
notes: For breadboard prototyping. Get 120pcs kit minimum

name: USB-C Cable
description: USB-C data cable for power + programming
notes: Any USB-C cable works

name: 3.3V FTDI Adapter
description: USB to TTL serial adapter, 3.3V logic
notes: For firmware flashing if no USB-C on board

name: ReSpeaker 2-Mic HAT
description: All-in-one mic array + amp for Raspberry Pi / ESP32
notes: No-solder option. Has 2x INMP441 + WM8960 codec + 3W amp

name: Single PCB Prototype
description: Custom PCB for ESP32-S3 + INMP441 + BME280 + WS2812B
notes: Gerber files in hardware/pcb/. Order 5pcs ~$5 + shipping

name: PLA Filament
notes: ~$0.50 per case. Black or white recommended

name: SUMMARY
notes: ESP32-S3 + INMP441 + WS2812B + capacitors

name: SUMMARY
notes: Above + PAM8403 + speaker

name: SUMMARY
notes: Above + BME280

name: SUMMARY
notes: ESP32-S3 + ReSpeaker HAT + WS2812B + caps

name: SUMMARY
notes: ESP32-S3 + custom PCB (per unit)
